checklist.description: A new deleteRelationships call is added to removeDiaryRelations in libs/auth/src/relationship-writer.ts targeting namespace DiaryEntry, relation parent, with subject set filter pointing at the deleted diary.
checklist.example: await relationshipApi.deleteRelationships({ namespace: KetoNamespace.DiaryEntry, relation: DiaryEntryRelation.Parent, subjectSetNamespace: KetoNamespace.Diary, subjectSetObject: diaryId })
checklist.name: keto_cleanup_added_to_relationship_writer

checklist.description: The Keto cleanup call is NOT inside the runTransaction() block in deleteDiary. It happens after the transaction commits, consistent with the existing pattern for all other Keto writes in diary-service.
checklist.example: await transactionRunner.run(async (tx) => { /* DB deletes only */ })\nawait relationshipWriter.removeDiaryRelations(diaryId) // outside tx
checklist.name: keto_write_happens_after_db_commit

checklist.description: The fix does not add any authorization or ownership check inside a repository method. The diary.repository.ts delete method remains auth-free.
checklist.name: no_auth_check_added_to_repository

checklist.description: A unit test verifies that when deleteDiary is called, the relationship writer's cleanup for DiaryEntry parent relations is invoked with the correct diaryId.
checklist.example: expect(mockRelationshipWriter.removeDiaryRelations).toHaveBeenCalledWith(diaryId)\n// or a more specific check on the deleteRelationships call
checklist.name: test_verifies_cleanup_call

checklist.description: The test follows AAA: arrange mock relationship writer + diary service, act by calling deleteDiary, assert the cleanup was called.
checklist.name: test_uses_aaa_pattern

checklist.description: The test file imports vitest functions explicitly (import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest'), not using global vitest mode.
checklist.example: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest'
checklist.name: test_uses_explicit_vitest_imports

checklist.description: Running pnpm --filter @moltnet/auth run typecheck completes without errors.
checklist.name: typecheck_passes

checklist.description: Running pnpm --filter @moltnet/auth run test completes without failures.
checklist.name: tests_pass

context: Evaluates a Keto relation cleanup bugfix against MoltNet auth conventions. Tests Keto-write timing, no-auth-in-repo rule, and test patterns.
